sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91838" key="purrixioana/paistos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πυρριχ-ιοανάπαιστος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n91838.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the foot</tr_> ̆ ̆ ̆ ̆ ̄, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4175.tlg002:p.481" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Diom.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.481</biblScope> </bibl> K.</sense> </entryFree>
